name: postman-demo
description: Enterprise-grade Postman API Test Automation Framework
author: Michael Zhou <zhou_juxi@hotmail.com>

scripts.test: newman run collections/E-Commerce-API-Test-Suite.postman_collection.json -e environments/dev.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/newman-report.json
scripts.test:dev: newman run collections/E-Commerce-API-Test-Suite.postman_collection.json -e environments/dev.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report-dev.html --reporter-json-export reports/newman-report-dev.json
scripts.test:data-driven: newman run collections/E-Commerce-API-Test-Suite.postman_collection.json -e environments/dev.postman_environment.json -d data/test-orders-data.csv -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/data-driven-report.html
scripts.test:full: npm run db:reset && newman run collections/E-Commerce-API-Test-Suite.postman_collection.json -e environments/dev.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra,json,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/newman-report.json --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-report.xml 2>&1 | tee logs/newman-$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log; npm run db:reset
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && npm run clean:logs
